summary: Tested Documents page new features: folder CRUD, document process/move, calendar filter, backup status. All 17 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified working. Fixed HTML nesting issue (button inside button) in FolderItem component.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/documents/folders - create folder with name and color (200)
Backend: POST /api/documents/{id}/move - move to root (null folder_id) (200)
Backend: GET /api/documents?status=processed - filter by processed status (200)
Backend: GET /api/backup/status - returns auto_backup_enabled and last_backup_at (200)
Backend: POST /api/documents/upload with folder_id - upload to folder (200)
Backend: Auth required for folders endpoint (401/403)
Backend: Auth required for process endpoint (401/403)
Backend: Auth required for move endpoint (401/403)
Backend: Auth required for backup/status endpoint (401/403)
Frontend: Documents page loads at /documents route
Frontend: Folder sidebar visible with create button [data-testid='folder-sidebar']
Frontend: Folder name input in dialog [data-testid='new-folder-name-input']
Frontend: Folder selector in upload dialog [data-testid='upload-folder']
Frontend: Process button for pending docs [data-testid='process-doc-{id}']
Frontend: Move dialog shows folder options [data-testid='move-to-folder-{id}']
Frontend: Folder breadcrumb appears when folder selected
Frontend: Document status changes to 'Обработан' after process
Frontend: Document shows folder badge after move
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: HTML nesting issue in FolderItem component - changed outer <button> to <div role='button'> to allow nested delete button
DocumentsPage.jsx: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
documents.py: All folder CRUD, process, and move endpoints properly implemented with user_id filtering
google_sheets.py: backup_status endpoint returns auto_backup_enabled and last_backup_at fields as required
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test folders and documents during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Documents page fully tested with new folder features. Key endpoints: POST/GET/DELETE /api/documents/folders, POST /api/documents/{id}/process, POST /api/documents/{id}/move. Calendar filter uses react-day-picker. Status filter includes 'Обработан' (processed). Folder sidebar only visible on md+ screens. Fixed HTML nesting issue in FolderItem component (button inside button -> div with role=button). Existing folder 'Выписки EUR' was created during development.

document_process.description: Marks document as 'processed' without linking to transaction

document_move.description: Moves document to folder or root (null folder_id)

bug_fix_applied.issue: HTML nesting error: <button> inside <button> in FolderItem component caused hydration warning
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed outer <button> to <div role='button' tabIndex={0}> with keyboard event handlers
